# MarketplaceKitError.insufficientStorageSpace(_:)

**Case**

An error that indicates that the device lacks the required disk space to install the app.

## Declaration

```swift
case insufficientStorageSpace(Measurement<UnitInformationStorage>)
```

## Device and platform compatibility errors

- **MarketplaceKitError.minimumPlatformVersionNotSatisfied(_:)**: An error that indicates the device has a lower platform version than that required by the requested app.
- **MarketplaceKitError.missingCapabilities(_:)**: An error that indicates the device lacks capabilities that requested app requires.
- **MarketplaceKitError.noSupportedVariant**: An error that indicates the requested app doesn’t have a supported variant for this device.
- **MarketplaceKitError.unsupportedPlatform**: An error that indicates that the requested app doesn’t support the platform.
